title: Vladivostok、Primorsky Krai — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Vladivostok、Primorsky Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Vladivostok是Primorsky Krai的一個城市，人口約605,000。Russia’s Pacific port city, a dynamic hub for trade and culture, home to the famous Golden Horn Bridge and Russky Island.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
